reviews.review_description: Cars look good interior looks good to start lobby look good The building in the open road part and driving is good did brakes need to be adjusted when you hit the brakes you just spin out of control so you break and turn a little bit your car goes crazy then needs to be fixed it rag dolls all over the place I have no sense of weight when you break it and turn it it just starts sliding and flipping all over the place that needs to be fixed to slippery when you break and turn needs more tracks and levels please tunnels dramatic weather like rain thunderstorm snow snow levels in the cars on some of the races need to be fixed cuz they drive slow they start off fast and once you catch up they just be moving slow and slow paced in order The car is just sometimes the car be stuck on the track and don't be moving nowhere but some still coming out the cars running stuck The car still drives slower than you they start off going fast and then they slow down start going slow like it's a glitch they don't put up no race or no sense of speed that kind of kills the game some of the environment in the city is floating in the air and the grass is sunk into the ground please fix these bugs and they're just the braking when turning cuz your slide all over the place

for it being early access, its not all too bad. The only problem im having ts that the grab button and trigger both grab the wheel and is really annoying when trying to steer. High hopes for this game

developer_response.body: Thanks for the comments. We’ve fixed the trigger-grab conflict and improved the driving mechanics. If the issue persists, please let us know.

reviews.review_description:
From the moment I started playing I can see huge potential in this game.

The car feels nice to drive and the graphics for a standalone vr game is very good.

The steering in the game is good but when taking corners your wheel becomes wonky needing you to ungrip it for it to become straight again.

The reason Ive put only three stars is because there’s a few bugs that made by experience worse. But obviously there’s bugs so hopefully my option changes in the future 
 
But overall the graphics are great and the car feel nice to drive. This game has the potential to be one of the great racing games on the Vr.

developer_response.body:
Hello,
Thanks for your feedback!
We’ve fixed many bugs and improved the graphics in latest update — hope you enjoy a smoother experience.
All the best,
Pixhetic

reviews.review_description:
Have spoken with the devs since this review, and they are updating the hand tracking shortly, along with a few other things. Fingers crossed 🤞 game has great potential. 

I can see this having great potential, but the hand tracking is just way of you can’t get around the track without having to completely cross over your arms and losing your driving line. 

Needs at the very least some kind of leaderboard fastest time lap, and currently there is nothing to make you want to play it it single player. 

I know it’s in early access but at £9.99 it’s not worth its price tag in this current state, I won’t be refunding but please at least sort out the hand tracking 

Also the speed of the cars are very slow and not quite up to the “speed” thrill of other racers like VRider SBK 

However I can see huge potential

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! We’re still working on the hand tracking mechanics and new gameplay content. In the meantime, we just released a Free Roam update that we hope you enjoy. More features and tracks are on the way.

reviews.review_description:
MotorsportVR offers a solid and satisfying VR racing experience right from the start. The user interface is clean, the sense of speed is engaging, and the braking feels impressively realistic. It’s still in Early Access, but already shows huge promise—with multiplayer and more tracks hopefully just around the corner.

Racing games are still rare in VR, and this one hits the track with confidence. It reminded me of a VR version of Forza, indie-style. If the studio keeps iterating based on feedback, this could grow into one of the most enjoyable and complete VR racers available.

If you love cars and want that rush of racing in full immersion—MotorsportVR is worth keeping your eye on. 🏎️💨
